Manchester United’s Defensive Crisis Deepens Ahead of Crucial Premier League Clash

Jan 23, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

Manchester United’s Defensive Crisis Deepens Ahead of Crucial Premier League Clash

Manchester United defensive crisis has intensified as injuries and inconsistent performances continue to disrupt Erik ten Hag’s plans ahead of a crucial Premier League fixture. With key defenders sidelined and confidence visibly shaken, United’s backline has become a growing concern for fans and pundits alike.
